title: PaxStressia rival patrons (rules/patrons.json)
description: The systemic rival patrons (DESIGN.md §8) — the regime-backers competing with you in the allegiance market. Real states modeled on documented playbooks; `model` ships the sourcing for the in-game Sources screen. Used by the multi-patron market in grand mode (gated by rivalry_feedback).

model.description: The documented playbook this archetype is modeled on.

speed.description: Relative capture speed multiplier for this patron's offer.

oil_funded.description: Whether a high oil market enriches (and emboldens) this patron.
